inputs.label: Power Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Average power consumption of the device or system in kilowatts.

inputs.label: Usage per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of hours the device is used per day, on average.

inputs.label: Days per Month
inputs.businessContext: Number of days per month the device is operated.

inputs.label: Number of Devices
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical devices operating under the same conditions.

inputs.label: Cost per kWh
inputs.businessContext: Electricity tariff rate per kilowatt-hour (in the local currency).
